description.from: Unleashes an attack that bounces 4 times starting from the nearest enemy, dealing 684*(1+0.3Skill Level)+300% of Attack Power Magic Damage to each enemy hit. Damage increases by up to 100% the farther the enemy is.
description.to: Unleashes an attack that bounces 4 times starting from the nearest enemy, dealing 684*(1+0.3Skill Level)+300% of Attack Power Magic Damage to each enemy hit. Damage increases by up to 100% the farther the enemy is. This attack is treated as a Normal Attack.

description.from: Deals 792(1+0.3Skill Level)+347.5% of Attack Power Magic Damage 2 time(s) to a random enemy and surrounding enemies, and stuns them for 1.8 sec. Damage increases by up to 200% the farther the enemy is.
description.to: Deals 792*(1+0.3Skill Level)+347.5% of Attack Power Magic Damage 2 time(s) to a random enemy and surrounding enemies, and stuns them for 1sec. Damage increases by up to 200% the farther the enemy is.

description.from: Deals 342(1+0.3Skill Level)+150% of Attack Power Magic Damage 6 time(s) to enemies within range, knocks them back for 1.8 sec, and reduces their Critical Chance by 100% for 7 sec. Damage increases by up to 150% the farther the enemy is.
description.to: Deals 342*(1+0.3Skill Level)+150% of Attack Power Magic Damage 6 time(s) to enemies within range, knocks them back for 1sec, and reduces their Critical Chance by 25% for 7sec. Damage increases by up to 150% the farther the enemy is.

description.from: Attacks the farthest enemy, dealing 799(1+0.3*Skill Level)+350% of Attack Power Magic Damage, knocking them back for 1.2 sec, and increasing Magic Damage taken by 20% for 6 sec. Damage increases by up to 200% the farther the enemy is.
description.to: Attacks the farthest enemy, dealing 799*(1+0.3Skill Level)+350% of Attack Power Magic Damage, knocking them back for 0.5sec, and increasing Magic Damage taken by 20% for 6sec. Damage increases by up to 200% the farther the enemy is.

light.from: For 7 seconds, reduces Accuracy of enemies hit by 200.

dark.from: If there is only 1 enemy, damage dealt is increased by 100%.
dark.to: For 7 sec, reduces Accuracy of enemies hit by 150.

dark.from: Damage dealt to non-hero enemies is increased by 30%, and damage taken is reduced by 30%.
dark.to: Damage dealt to non-hero enemies is increased by 10%, and damage taken is reduced by 10%.
